global.description: The ad features a bold headline and call to action with abstract graphic elements.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to engage with PulsePlay and start for free.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Central graphic element
elements.description: A large, abstract shape in the center of the ad, possibly a stylized graphic or icon.

elements.label: Secondary graphic element
elements.description: A medium-sized, abstract shape that complements the central graphic, positioned centrally.

elements.label: Overlay graphic element
elements.description: A large, rectangular shape that overlays other elements, providing a backdrop for text.

elements.label: Bottom graphic element
elements.description: A small, circular shape located towards the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Bottom left graphic element
elements.description: A small, circular shape positioned in the lower left corner of the ad.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: Bold, large text at the top of the ad that reads 'PulsePlay UGC' against a blue background.

elements.label: Call to action text
elements.description: Prominent text in the center of the ad that says 'Stream the hype Start free today' in a clear, readable font.
elements.text_content: Stream the hype Start free today

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded rectangular button at the bottom of the ad with the text 'Get offer' in a contrasting color.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, rewarded_video, bright and modern, PulsePlay UGC, Stream the hype, Get offer
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, the main body text is centered, and the CTA button is at the bottom.
